lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You helped that traveler with directions earlier. Saw it myself.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: They looked lost. Figured they'd owe me later, that's all.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Maybe. Or maybe you're kinder than you admit to yourself.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Don't romanticize me, Alon. But... they did seem grateful.
